description: Read-only final review of remote collection verification and dashboard layout changes.

prompts.rielaPromptTemplate: Review completed implementation and verification evidence for concrete blocking defects only.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Work read-only in the repository. Never print credentials, private keys, or raw usage events. Do not edit, stage, commit, or push.

steps.description: Adversarially inspect the current diff and supplied evidence.
